In rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core::i16

rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core::i16

Constant MAX

1.6.0 · Source 
pub const MAX: i16 = i16::MAX; // 32_767i16
👎Deprecating in a future version: replaced by the MAX associated constant on this type
Expand description

The largest value that can be represented by this integer type. Use i16::MAX instead.

§Examples

// deprecated way
let max = std::i16::MAX;

// intended way
let max = i16::MAX;
